name: Symplectic Form
description: ω closed, nondegenerate 2-form. (M,ω) symplectic. dim even. Canonical symplectic ℝ²ⁿ.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: ω 2-form\nclosed dω=0"]
    D2["Def: Nondegenerate\nωⁿ≠0"]
    D3["Def: Symplectic manifold\n(M,ω)"]
    D4["Def: Canonical\nω=Σ dpᵢ∧dqᵢ"]
    T1["Thm: dim M even"]
    T2["Thm: ω^n volume form"]
    T3["Thm: ω gives iso\nT_p→T_p*"]
    T4["Thm: Cotangent T*Q\nnatural sympl"]
    T5["Thm: Lagrangian\nL isotropic, dim n"]
    D1 --> D3
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D2 --> T3
    D4 --> T4
    D3 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
